argument.script: async (intermediate) => { for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { const box = document.querySelector('[data-testid="tweetTextarea_0"]'); if (box) return { ready: true }; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); } return { ready: false }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (!intermediate.ready) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find the tweet composer text area.' }; const text = '{{ text }}'; const submit = {{ submit }}; try { const box = document.querySelector('[data-testid="tweetTextarea_0"]'); box.focus(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', text); box.dispatchEvent(new ClipboardEvent('paste', { clipboardData: dt, bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); if (!submit) { return { ok: true, message: 'Text entered (not submitted).', text: text, submitted: false }; } const btn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="tweetButton"]') || document.querySelector('[data-testid="tweetButtonInline"]'); if (btn && !btn.disabled) { btn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); return { ok: true, message: 'Tweet posted successfully.', text: text, submitted: true }; } return { ok: false, message: 'Tweet button is disabled or not found.', text: text, submitted: false }; } catch (e) { return { ok: false, message: String(e) }; } }

variables.name: text
variables.help: The text content of the tweet

variables.name: submit
variables.help: Whether to submit the tweet (false = only enter text)
